description: PR7 — cooperative cancel at stage boundary. Cancel request during a run must flip status→cancelled at the next stage boundary; result_json stays null; last_stage_seen reflects the last completed stage.
notes: Commit 4 wires the cooperative cancel check. The test harness will seed cancel_requested=True before the runner starts, so the first stage-boundary check flips status→cancelled before any placement lands.
No preemption mid-stage — cancel only observed at boundaries (DoR §Implementation cautions).
